calculation.price_to_fair_value: close / fair_value; fair_value uses priority above
calculation.margin_of_safety: 1 - price_to_fair_value (signed; can be negative when price > fair_value)
calculation.formula_conversion: upside_to_price = margin_of_safety / (1 - margin_of_safety); margin_of_safety = upside_to_price / (1 + upside_to_price)
calculation.quality_score: percentile(ROE, grossMargins, operatingMargins, debtToEquity inverse) weighted 30/25/25/20
calculation.momentum_score: percentile(3m return, 6m return, 12m return, distance to 200D MA) weighted 25/25/30/20
calculation.catalyst_score: percentile(analyst upside, recommendationMean inverse, earningsQuarterlyGrowth, analystCount) weighted 35/25/25/15
calculation.risk_score: percentile(1y volatility, 1y max drawdown, beta, debtToEquity) weighted 35/35/20/10
calculation.value_quality_compound_guardrails: margin_of_safety>=15% and certainty_score>=65 hard gate; margin<30% / certainty<75 soft penalty

external_mos_references.reference: 1y Target Est (analyst target); used when DCF iv_base unavailable
iv_base used as fair_value for covered symbols
Margin of Safety = (Current Market Price - Intrinsic Value) / Intrinsic Value
Margin of Safety (%) = (Fair Value - Market Price) / Fair Value
Price/Fair Value ratio and discount to fair value = (Fair Value - Price) / Fair Value

non_realtime_disclaimer: stock-data-hub 与 DCF API 可能有短延迟；本文件为市场数据支撑，但不是交易所逐笔级实时数据。
